rationale: The cited paper is used in the Study 1 methods section to justify model specification, specifically the inclusion of time-varying price and SKU controls as drivers of market-share fluctuations. This is a concrete, functional use tied to the paper's main empirical analysis, not just a background name-drop. At the same time, the citing paper does not extend or challenge Ataman et al.'s core long-term marketing-strategy claims.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Ataman et al. (2010) as methodological support when specifying control variables in its market-share model. It borrows prior evidence on determinants of brand market share for empirical setup in a different research context.
